articles.title: Brexit cost 6% of UK economy, Bank of England company data suggests
articles.summary: Analysis showed how much the UK could have grown if it had not exited the EU.
articles.titleZh: 英国央行公司数据显示，脱欧使英国经济损失 6%
articles.summaryZh: 分析显示，如果英国没有退出欧盟，英国的经济增长幅度是多少。

articles.title: Arsenal to begin Premier League title defence against promoted Coventry
articles.summary: The first match of the 2026-27 season sees the top-flight champions face the second-tier Championship winners.
articles.titleZh: 阿森纳将开始对阵升班马考文垂的英超联赛冠军卫冕
articles.summaryZh: 2026-27 赛季的第一场比赛将由顶级联赛冠军队迎战乙级联赛冠军队。

contentParagraphs.en: The first match of the 2026-27 Premier League season sees the reigning top-flight champions face the second-tier Championship winners.Arsenal will kick off their Premier League title defence against promoted Coventry City on August 21.The Premier League fixtures for the 2026-27 campaign were released on Friday, with the Gunners’ home game against Frank Lampard’s Coventry among the highlights in the opening round of matches.Recommended Stories list of 3 itemslist 1 of 3World Cup Day 9: USA, Brazil and Morocco return to actionlist 2 of 3Luis Romo strikes as Mexico become first team to reach World Cup knockoutslist 3 of 3Bouaddi: Morocco’s teenage World Cup star who could have played for Franceend of listCoventry are back in the top flight for the first time in 25 years after winning the Championship last season.Andoni Iraola’s first Premier League game as Liverpool manager will be at Newcastle United on August 23. Former Bournemouth boss Iraola’s Anfield debut is set for the weekend of August 29 against Nottingham Forest.Manchester City start life after Pep Guardiola at home to Bournemouth on August 23.City are expected to appoint former Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca to replace Guardiola, who stepped down at the end of the season after a decade in charge.New Chelsea manager Xabi Alonso begins his reign with a west London derby at Fulham on August 24.Hull City, who won promotion via the Championship playoffs, begin their first Premier League season since 2017 with a home fixture against Manchester United on August 22.Elsewhere on the first weekend, Europa League winners Aston Villa travel to Brighton & Hove Albion.Mikel Arteta guided Arsenal to the Premier League title last season, ending a 22-year drought [Matthew Childs/Action Images via Reuters]Arsenal, champions for the first time since 2004, face a testing period after they host Coventry.Mikel Arteta’s side head to Villa for their first away league game of the season, then meet Chelsea at Emirates Stadium on September 5.The weekend of September 12 brings the first Manchester derby of the post-Guardiola era, while Liverpool host Manchester United on November 21.City and Arsenal do not face each other until November 28 at the Emirates Stadium.The first Merseyside derby of the season between Everton and Liverpool is scheduled for November 28 at the Hill Dickinson Stadium.Roberto De Zerbi will get his first taste of the north London derby on December 5 when Tottenham host Arsenal.The pick of the Boxing Day schedule sees Coventry boss Lampard facing his old club Chelsea on December 26.The final day of the Premier League will take place on May 30, with Arsenal at home to Brighton, while City travel to Sunderland and Liverpool host Bournemouth. Chelsea and United finish at home to Brentford and Fulham, respectively.The start and end of the upcoming season are later than usual due to the FIFA World Cup 2026, which finishes just 34 days before the Premier League begins.Arsenal will face FA Cup winners City in the Community Shield, which serves as the curtain raiser to the top-flight season, on August 16.
contentParagraphs.zh: 2026-27赛季英超联赛首场比赛，顶级联赛卫冕冠军将迎战乙级联赛冠军球队。阿森纳将于8月21日对阵升班马考文垂城，开启英超卫冕之路。2026-27赛季英超联赛赛程于周五发布，枪手主场迎战兰帕德率领的考文垂队是首轮比赛的亮点之一。 推荐故事列表 3 条列表3 世界杯第 9 天第 1 名：美国、巴西和摩洛哥重返赛场 名单 3 中 2 路易斯·罗莫进球，墨西哥成为第一支进入世界杯淘汰赛的球队 名单 3 中 3 布阿迪：本来可以为法国队效力的摩洛哥少年世界杯球星 名单结束 考文垂在上赛季赢得冠军后 25 年来首次重返顶级联赛。安多尼·伊劳拉作为利物浦主教练的第一场英超比赛将在纽卡斯尔联队进行8月23日。前伯恩茅斯主帅伊劳拉的安菲尔德首秀定于8月29日周末对阵诺丁汉森林。曼城在8月23日瓜迪奥拉主场对阵伯恩茅斯后开始新的生活。曼城预计将任命前切尔西主帅恩佐·马雷斯卡接替瓜迪奥拉，瓜迪奥拉在执教十年后于赛季结束时辞职。切尔西新任主帅哈维·阿隆索将于8月在富勒姆举行的西伦敦德比中开始他的统治24. 通过英冠附加赛晋级的赫尔城，将在 8 月 22 日主场迎战曼联，开始他们自 2017 年以来的第一个英超赛季。在第一个周末，欧罗巴联赛冠军阿斯顿维拉将前往布莱顿。米克尔·阿尔特塔上赛季带领阿森纳夺得英超冠军，结束了 22 年的冠军荒 [Matthew Childs/Action Images viaReuters] 阿森纳自此以来首次获得冠军。 2004年，主场迎战考文垂后面临考验期。阿尔特塔的球队前往维拉进行本赛季首场客场联赛，然后于9月5日在酋长球场迎战切尔西。9月12日周末带来后瓜迪奥拉时代的首场曼彻斯特德比，而利物浦则在11月21日主场迎战曼联。曼城和阿森纳直到11月28日才会在酋长球场交锋。埃弗顿和利物浦之间的本赛季首场默西塞德德比是定于11月28日在希尔迪金森体育场举行。罗伯托·德泽尔比将于12月5日托特纳姆热刺主场迎战阿森纳，这是他第一次参加北伦敦德比。节礼日赛程中，考文垂主帅兰帕德将在12月26日迎战老东家切尔西。英超联赛的最后一天将于5月30日举行，阿森纳主场对阵布莱顿，曼城将客场挑战桑德兰，利物浦主场迎战伯恩茅斯。切尔西和曼联分别在主场对阵布伦特福德和富勒姆。由于 2026 年世界杯即将结束，新赛季的开始和结束时间比平常晚，距离英超联赛开始仅 34 天。阿森纳将于 8 月 16 日在社区盾杯赛中迎战足总杯冠军曼城，这场比赛将拉开顶级联赛的帷幕。

articles.title: On the trail of the dotcom queen: how Julie Meyer left a pattern of unpaid bills, missing funds and broken dreams in her wake
articles.summary: Investigation: The entrepreneur was once the toast of London’s tech scene, a ‘global leader of tomorrow’ who starred on Dragons’ Den and promised untold riches for the startups she championed. But people she worked with in the last decade, from Malta to Switzerland, describe a ve
articles.titleZh: 追寻互联网女王的踪迹：朱莉·迈耶 (Julie Meyer) 如何留下未付账单、资金缺失和梦想破灭的模式
articles.summaryZh: 调查：这位企业家曾经是伦敦科技界的焦点，是“未来的全球领导者”，曾出演《龙穴》，并承诺为她所支持的初创公司带来难以估量的财富。但过去十年中与她共事的人，从马耳他到瑞士，描述了

contentParagraphs.en: Julie Meyer is sitting in a starkly lit attic, surrounded by piles of £50 notes. A California blond in a crisp, white shirt, her long, stockinged legs crossed at the knee, she listens intently to the young man standing before her. As he talks, she sizes him up. Eventually, she tells him: “I’m going to make you an offer.” It could be a scene from a heist movie, but Meyer is in a BBC studio, shooting a 2009 episode of the TV show Dragons’ Den. A celebrated entrepreneur with a venture capital fund, she is ready to invest in whichever contestants catch her eye. For the viewers, she has some advice: “What is success? A lot of it is self-belief. Continuing on when most rational people would stop.”This is an online spin-off from the original Dragons’ Den series, so the stakes are a little lower. But for Lex Deak, a 23-year-old with a big idea for a social media website, what happens in this room today could be make or break. He desperately wants to work with Meyer.During the dotcom boom that tore through London like tulip fever in the late 1990s, Meyer was a big name. Apple’s brightly coloured iMacs were flying off the shelves, people were rushing to get online, and the web was becoming truly worldwide. For a short, thrilling moment, it felt as if anybody could start a tech business – and get filthy rich doing it.At the centre of it all was Meyer’s monthly networking club, First Tuesday, where young hustlers with little more than a concept and a funky brand name could raise millions on a handshake, as investors scrambled for a piece of the digital revolution. Along with Martha Lane Fox and Brent Hoberman, founders of the online travel agency Lastminute.com, Meyer became the face of a movement, the star of a golden generation that was upending the male, pale and pinstriped world of British industry.Accolades followed: the Davos forum named Meyer a “global leader of tomorrow”; the Wall Street Journal ranked her as one of the most influential businesswomen in Europe. She had a newspaper column, was recruited as a UK government adviser, and in 2012 was awarded an MBE.For Deak, who had watched Dragons’ Den religiously, taking notes in front of the TV, Meyer seemed the ideal mentor. When she offered £20,000 for a stake in his venture, Family Fridge (like Facebook, but for families), he didn’t hesitate to say yes. “I was very keen to get her involvement, but very naive,” he says now. She gave him space in her office and introduced him to people. But the money? He never saw a penny.Meyer in Dragons’ Den Online, 2009. Photograph: Mark Harrison/ BBC“I was primed and ready to be the young, talked‑about tech entrepreneur. I’d been nominated as a rising star by the Institute of Directors. At the time, it felt like she had stolen an opportunity from me … it created a fork in my trajectory. She definitely did me a wrong-un.”Deak says Meyer never gave him a straight no; she just kept asking him to revise the business plan. Of course, not all deals agreed on air work out – many fall through after the show, during the due diligence process. As time passed, however, Deak found himself offering support to a growing circle of people who say they were damaged by their own dealings with Meyer.Over the years, the one-time queen of the dotcom scene has left a trail of trouble in her wake, with a series of failed ventures that entangled everyone from the former chair of Marks & Spencer to the prime minister of Malta. The Guardian has seen evidence of insolvent companies, unpaid wages, debts to suppliers and millions in lost investments. Those who admired and trusted her say they have been left with burning regrets, describing a seemingly endless cycle of seduction and betrayal.A former associate describes Meyer as a “professional confidence trickster”. For her ex-boyfriend and business partner, the Swiss millionaire René Eichenberger, she is a “master of manipulation and false narratives … Once she gets exposed in one country, she finds new supporters who believe in her and help her move on to the next jurisdiction.”In recent months, the Guardian has heard allegations of a darker nature against Meyer. Investors and founders say they have lost hundreds of thousands in three separate incidents, which they describe as scams.Meyer did not respond to requests for comment. She has previously rejected any suggestion her activities are not above board. In her marketing, she describes herself as “one of Europe’s leading backers of entrepreneurs”, who has spent decades identifying transformational companies.Despite years of controversy, she has kept the show on the road, hiring new teams and starting new ventures, all while releasing an endless stream of social media content to maintain her profile and seek out fresh contacts. “This will continue until the public sees who Julie Meyer really is,” says Eichenberger.In a year-long investigation, the Guardian has followed the trail to London, Malta, Switzerland and Greece, gathering accounts from dozens of former staff, business associates and entrepreneurs. By speaking out, they hope their stories can serve as a warning.LondonIf there was one place for a young and hungry entrepreneur to be in the late 90s, it was London: a Silicon Valley breeze was blowing into town, and the city was at the centre of Europe’s first internet frenzy. Tony Blair had entered Downing Street at the head of the first Labour government in 18 years, and the capital was swinging to the beat of the Cool Britannia pop‑culture revival.“It was fabulously exciting,” recalls the author and former BBC tech journalist Rory Cellan-Jones. “I mean, the polar opposite of going to BP’s annual general meeting. There were a lot of parties. There were people becoming rich overnight in a way that we in this country were absolutely not used to.”It was into this heady atmosphere that Julie Marie Meyer, armed with a US accent and a master’s from France’s prestigious Insead business school, first arrived in the UK.Born in Michiga
contentParagraphs.zh: 朱莉·迈耶 (Julie Meyer) 坐在一间灯火通明的阁楼里，周围堆满了 50 英镑的钞票。她是一位加州金发女郎，穿着清爽的白衬衫，穿着长筒袜的双腿交叉在膝盖处，聚精会神地听着站在她面前的年轻人说话。当他说话时，她打量着他。最终，她告诉他：“我要向你提出要约。”这可能是一部抢劫电影中的场景，但迈耶当时正在 BBC 工作室拍摄电视剧《龙穴》2009 年的一集。她是一位拥有风险投资基金的著名企业家，随时准备投资任何吸引她眼球的参赛者。对于观众，她有一些建议：“什么是成功？很大程度上是自信。当大多数理性人停止时继续。”这是原版《龙穴》系列的在线衍生作品，因此风险要低一些。但对于 23 岁的莱克斯·迪克 (Lex Deak) 来说，他有一个社交媒体网站的伟大想法，今天在这个房间里发生的事情可能决定成败。他非常想与 Meyer 合作。在 20 世纪 90 年代末，像郁金香热一样席卷伦敦的互联网热潮期间，Meyer 是个大人物。苹果色彩鲜艳的 iMac 抢购一空，人们争先恐后地上网，网络真正变得全球化。在一个短暂而激动人心的时刻，感觉好像任何人都可以创办一家科技企业，并通过它获得巨额财富。这一切的中心是迈耶的每月社交俱乐部“First Tuesday”，在那里，年轻的骗子只拥有一个概念和一个时髦的品牌名称，只要握手就可以筹集数百万美元，而投资者则在争夺数字革命的一杯羹。迈耶与在线旅行社 Last 分钟网站的创始人玛莎·莱恩·福克斯 (Martha Lane Fox) 和布伦特·霍伯曼 (Brent Hoberman) 一起成为一场运动的代言人，成为颠覆英国工业界男性、苍白、细条纹世界的黄金一代的明星。 荣誉接踵而至：达沃斯论坛将迈耶评为“明日全球领袖”； 《华尔街日报》将她评为欧洲最有影响力的商界女性之一。她在报纸上发表专栏，被聘为英国政府顾问，并于 2012 年被授予大英帝国勋章。对于曾认真观看《龙穴》并在电视机前做笔记的迪克来说，迈耶似乎是理想的导师。当她出价 20,000 英镑购买他的企业 Family Fridge（类似 Facebook，但面向家庭）的股份时，他毫不犹豫地答应了。 “我非常渴望让她参与进来，但很天真，”他现在说道。她在办公室给了他空间，并将他介绍给了人们。但钱呢？他一文不名。梅耶在《龙穴在线》，2009 年。摄影：Mark Harrison/BBC “我已经做好了准备，准备成为年轻的、备受谈论的科技企业家。我被董事学会提名为后起之秀。当时，感觉她从我身上偷走了一个机会……这在我的人生轨迹中造成了一个岔路口。她确实对我做了错事。”迪克说，梅耶从来没有直接拒绝过他；他从来没有直接拒绝过他。她只是不断要求他修改商业计划。当然，并非所有在空中达成的交易都能成功——许多交易在展会结束后的尽职调查过程中都失败了。然而，随着时间的推移，迪克发现自己为越来越多的人提供支持，他们说自己因与迈耶的交易而受到损害。 多年来，这位曾经的互联网女王留下了一系列麻烦，一系列失败的冒险让从马莎百货前主席到马耳他总理的所有人都陷入困境。 《卫报》看到了一些公司资不抵债、拖欠工资、欠供应商的债务以及数百万美元投资损失的证据。那些钦佩和信任她的人表示，他们感到非常后悔，描述了似乎无休止的诱惑和背叛的循环。 一位前同事将迈耶描述为“职业信心骗子”。对于她的前男友兼商业伙伴、瑞士百万富翁雷内·艾森伯格来说，她是“操纵和虚假叙述的大师……一旦她在一个国家曝光，她就会找到相信她的新支持者，并帮助她进入下一个司法管辖区。”近几个月来，《卫报》听到了针对迈耶的黑暗性质的指控。投资者和创始人表示，他们在三起不同的事件中损失了数十万美元，他们称这些事件为骗局。迈耶没有回应置评请求。她此前否认了任何关于她的活动不光明正大的说法。在她的营销中，她将自己描述为“欧洲领先的企业家支持者之一”，几十年来一直在寻找转型公司。尽管多年来饱受争议，她仍然让节目继续前进，招聘新团队并创办新企业，同时发布源源不断的社交媒体内容以维护自己的形象并寻找新的联系人。艾森伯格表示：“这种情况将持续下去，直到公众认清朱莉·迈耶的真实身份。”在长达一年的调查中，《卫报》追踪了伦敦、马耳他、瑞士和希腊的踪迹，收集了数十名前员工、商业伙伴和企业家的账户。通过发声，他们希望自己的故事能够起到警示作用。 伦敦 如果说 90 年代末有一个地方适合一位年轻而饥渴的企业家，那就是伦敦：硅谷的微风正吹进小镇，这座城市是欧洲第一次互联网狂热的中心。托尼·布莱尔 (Tony Blair) 进入唐宁街，领导 18 年来第一届工党政府，首都正随着“酷不列颠”(Cool Britannia) 流行文化复兴的节拍而摇摆不定。“这非常令人兴奋，”作者、前 BBC 科技记者罗里·塞兰-琼斯 (Rory Cellan-Jones) 回忆道。 “我的意思是，这与参加英国石油公司的年度股东大会截然相反。那里有很多聚会。有人以我们这个国家绝对不习惯的方式一夜暴富。”操着美国口音、拥有法国著名欧洲工商管理学院硕士学位的朱莉·玛丽·迈耶 (Julie Marie Meyer) 正是在这种令人陶醉的氛围中首次抵达英国。

articles.title: Poll: Most Americans have the summer blues about Trump and the economy
articles.summary: A new NPR/PBS News/Marist poll finds a record low share of Americans approve of President Trump's job performance and his handling of the economy heading into the summer before a key midterm election.
articles.titleZh: 民意调查：大多数美国人对特朗普和经济感到夏季忧郁
articles.summaryZh: NPR/PBS News/Marist 的一项新民意调查发现，在关键中期选举之前的夏季，美国人对特朗普总统工作表现及其对经济处理方式的认可率创下历史新低。

contentParagraphs.en: President Trump speaks about the economy at a rally in January in Clive, Iowa.
contentParagraphs.zh: 特朗普总统在一月份在爱荷华州克莱夫举行的一次集会上谈到了经济。

contentParagraphs.en: As concern over gas prices remains high, President Trump's approval ratings continue falling to record lows, especially over his handling of the economy, according to the latest NPR/PBS News/Marist poll.
contentParagraphs.zh: 根据 NPR/PBS News/Marist 的最新民意调查，由于对天然气价格的担忧仍然很高，特朗普总统的支持率继续跌至历史低点，特别是在他对经济的处理方面。

contentParagraphs.en: Only a third of Americans say they approve of how Trump is handling the economy — three points lower than the worst marks given to former President Joe Biden during his term.
contentParagraphs.zh: 只有三分之一的美国人表示他们赞同特朗普处理经济的方式——比前总统乔·拜登任期内给出的最差分数低三个百分点。

contentParagraphs.en: Just 36% say they approve of Trump's overall job performance, while 59% say they disapprove, which is the widest gap Trump has faced during either term in office.
contentParagraphs.zh: 只有36%的人表示认可特朗普的整体工作表现，而59%的人表示不认可，这是特朗普在任一任期内面临的最大差距。

contentParagraphs.en: In a midterm election year where Democrats show more enthusiasm to vote and see a path to regain control of both the House and Senate, notably 22% of Republicans say they disapprove of Trump's handling of the economy. The share of Republicans who say they strongly approve of Trump's job performance dropped to 53% in June from 61% in April.
contentParagraphs.zh: 在中期选举年，民主党人表现出更大的投票热情，并看到了重新获得参众两院控制权的途径，尤其是 22% 的共和党人表示他们不赞成特朗普对经济的处理方式。表示强烈支持特朗普工作表现的共和党人比例从 4 月份的 61% 下降至 6 月份的 53%。

contentParagraphs.en: Regina Kulenga, a 36-year-old Trump voter in Georgia, told NPR that she wasn't sure if she would vote in the midterm elections and called Trump's actions since returning to office a "slap in the face."
contentParagraphs.zh: 佐治亚州36岁的特朗普选民雷吉娜·库伦加(Regina Kulenga)告诉NPR，她不确定自己是否会在中期选举中投票，并称特朗普自重返办公室以来的行为是“一记耳光”。

contentParagraphs.en: "The economy is suffering a lot right now, and I just feel like a lot of the things that he did promise, you know, we're still waiting," she said. "Honestly, I was a big Trump supporter in the beginning … and I'm like, someone needs to do something about it because he's not doing anything right now for the economy but making things, I feel, in my opinion, a lot worse than what they were."
contentParagraphs.zh: “现在经济正遭受重创，我只是觉得他确实承诺的很多事情，你知道，我们仍在等待，”她说。 “老实说，我一开始就是特朗普的坚定支持者……我想，有人需要为此做点什么，因为他现在没有为经济做任何事情，但在我看来，我觉得事情比原来更糟糕了。”

contentParagraphs.en: While Kulenga drives an electric car and does not have to worry about high gas prices, she said family members are struggling with rising costs for transportation and groceries.
contentParagraphs.zh: 虽然库伦加开的是电动汽车，不必担心高油价，但她表示，家庭成员正在努力应对交通和杂货成本上涨的问题。

contentParagraphs.en: More than three-quarters of Americans continue to say gas prices are a strain on their budgets, even as average gas prices have fallen about 40 cents a gallon from a month ago, according to AAA. The survey was taken before the latest announcement of an agreement between the U.S. and Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
contentParagraphs.zh: 根据 AAA 的数据，尽管平均汽油价格比一个月前每加仑下降了约 40 美分，但超过四分之三的美国人仍然表示汽油价格对他们的预算造成了压力。这项调查是在美国和伊朗最新宣布重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的协议之前进行的。

contentParagraphs.en: Those concerns have a real-world impact: 45% of Americans say they don't plan on taking a summer vacation this year, with about half of those people citing cost as the main reason.
contentParagraphs.zh: 这些担忧对现实世界产生了影响：45% 的美国人表示他们今年不打算去暑假，其中大约一半的人认为成本是主要原因。

contentParagraphs.en: The survey of 1,340 respondents was conducted June 8-11 and has a margin of error of +/- 3.0 percentage points, meaning results could be about 3 points higher or lower. Respondents were reached by live caller, text and online.
contentParagraphs.zh: 这项调查于 6 月 8 日至 11 日进行，涉及 1,340 名受访者，误差范围为 +/- 3.0 个百分点，这意味着结果可能高出或低出约 3 个百分点。通过现场来电、短信和在线方式联系受访者。

contentParagraphs.en: Trump — and his economy — continue to be unpopular
contentParagraphs.zh: 特朗普及其经济仍然不受欢迎

contentParagraphs.en: The erosion in Trump's support continues to cut across multiple demographic groups that were key to his victory in 2024.
contentParagraphs.zh: 特朗普的支持率持续下降，涉及多个人口群体，而这些群体是他在 2024 年获胜的关键。

contentParagraphs.en: Among independent voters, 64% continue to disapprove or strongly disapprove of Trump's performance, the same as April's survey, along with 94% of Democrats and 18% of Republicans. Approval among Gen Z (25%), Gen X (36%) and those with a household income below $50,000 a year (34%) continued to decline from the last poll. In February 2025, Trump had a net positive approval rating of 22 points among rural Americans, but he is now 10 points underwater. By a roughly 2-to-1margin, Latinos disapprove of Trump's performance.
contentParagraphs.zh: 在独立选民中，64%的人继续不赞成或强烈反对特朗普的表现，与4月份的调查相同，民主党人的这一比例为94%，共和党人的比例为18%。 Z 世代 (25%)、X 世代 (36%) 和家庭年收入低于 50,000 美元的人 (34%) 的支持率较上次民意调查继续下降。 2025 年 2 月，特朗普在美国农村地区的净支持率为 22 个百分点，但现在已落后 10 个百分点。拉丁美洲人以大约二比一的比例不赞成特朗普的表现。

contentParagraphs.en: When specifically asked about the economy, only one-third of white Americans without a college degree say they approve of Trump's handling, down from nearly half in April 2025.
contentParagraphs.zh: 当被具体问及经济问题时，没有大学学位的美国白人中只有三分之一表示支持特朗普的处理方式，低于 2025 年 4 月的近一半。

contentParagraphs.en: Still, the vast majority of Republicans are sticking by Trump, like 68-year-old Greg Votel, a retired law enforcement officer in Minnesota who said the president "can only do so much when you have a Congress that's fighting him tooth and nail to preserve the Democratic Party" and told NPR that it will take more time for Trump's plans to come to fruition.
contentParagraphs.zh: 尽管如此，绝大多数共和党人仍然支持特朗普，比如明尼苏达州 68 岁的退休执法官员格雷格·沃特尔 (Greg Votel)，他表示，“当国会竭尽全力保护民主党时，总统只能做这么多”，并告诉 NPR，特朗普的计划需要更多时间才能实现。

contentParagraphs.en: "It doesn't happen overnight," he said. "It's going to take some time; it's going to probably take at least two administrations. Trump's got the ball rolling."
contentParagraphs.zh: “这不会在一夜之间发生，”他说。 “这需要一些时间；可能至少需要两届政府。特朗普已经开始行动了。”

contentParagraphs.en: There are many economic factors working against Republicans this year, including high inflation, the ongoing war in Iran, higher gas prices and Trump administration policies around tariffs, among others.
contentParagraphs.zh: 今年有许多经济因素对共和党不利，包括高通胀、伊朗持续战争、汽油价格上涨以及特朗普政府围绕关税的政策等。

contentParagraphs.en: The Americans surveyed express concerns about the way those policies are affecting household decisions. When asked if they planned to take a vacation this summer, a similar share of respondents said yes (55%) compared to the last time the question was asked in 2025 and 2021. This year, cost was listed as a top factor against planning a trip, with those with a household income under $50,000, Gen X and those outside large cities and suburbs more likely to choose that reason.
contentParagraphs.zh: 接受调查的美国人对这些政策影响家庭决策的方式表示担忧。当被问及是否计划今年夏天去度假时，与 2025 年和 2021 年上次提出这个问题时相比，有类似比例的受访者表示“愿意”(55%)。今年，成本被列为反对计划旅行的首要因素，家庭收入低于 5 万美元的 X 世代以及大城市和郊区以外的人更有可能选择这个原因。

contentParagraphs.en: Vacation or not, two-thirds of adults say cost has had some or a great deal of impact on their summer plans, including 53% of Republicans and 49% of those over 60.
contentParagraphs.zh: 无论是否休假，三分之二的成年人表示，费用对他们的夏季计划产生了一些或很大的影响，其中包括 53% 的共和党人和 49% 的 60 岁以上人士。

articles.title: Brazil vs Haiti: World Cup – Prediction, how to watch and will Neymar play?
articles.summary: Five-time champions face Haiti in Philadelphia and need a win after a disappointing draw in their tournament opener.
articles.titleZh: 巴西 vs 海地：世界杯 – 预测、如何观看以及内马尔会参加比赛吗？
articles.summaryZh: 五届冠军将在费城迎战海地队，在揭幕战中令人失望的平局后，他们需要一场胜利。

contentParagraphs.en: The 2026 World Cup will have 13 different kickoff times. You can use the Al Jazeera Sport widget to find out exactly when your team is playing in your local time.Who: Brazil vs Haiti What: FIFA World Cup 2026 Group C match Where: Lincoln Financial Field, Philadelphia When: Friday, 6:30pm local time (00:30 GMT Saturday) How to follow: We’ll have all the build-up on Al Jazeera Sport from 21:00 GMT in advance of our live text commentary stream.Recommended Stories list of 3 itemslist 1 of 3Luis Romo strikes as Mexico become first team to reach World Cup knockoutslist 2 of 36-0, Kone injury, 2 red cards: All to know about Canada vs Qatar matchlist 3 of 3Bosnia’s World Cup knockout stage hopes dented with 4–1 loss to Switzerlandend of listBrazil’s draw with Morocco in their opening match left fans with more doubts than belief, with millions wondering if the record five-time champions are still among the world’s best teams.Having slipped to third in a group that they were expected to dominate, Brazil now face minnows Haiti in their second group game, needing a World Cup reset.Head coach Carlo Ancelotti will need to address several shortcomings with his team if he wants to avoid another disappointing performance during the group stage.Here is all to know before Brazil vs Haiti kicks off:No need to panic yet, suggests BrazilWhile Brazil’s weak showing in the first game has raised questions about the team’s odds of a deep run, Ancelotti believes it is no cause for concern just yet.Against Morocco, Brazil showed signs of nerves during the early stages and struggled to cope with the AFCON champions’ attack. Some players also struggled to cope with the intensity of the encounter.The Italian coach, who has been in charge for just over a year, said the upcoming match with Haiti offers his side an opportunity to address their weak points.“You don’t win the World ‌Cup in the first match,” Ancelotti told reporters in Philadelphia on Thursday.“The players’ self-criticism was very positive. I think we’ll sort out the problems; I remain confident that we’ll be competitive.”Critics have argued that Brazil lacks an identity under Ancelotti, but the 67-year-old – nicknamed “Don Carlo” – believes adapting his tactics according to gametime situations is more important.“I don’t want a single identity,” he said. “I want my team to have multiple identities.”Former Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti took over the team in May 2025 [Caean Couto/Imagn Images via Reuters]Haiti want to make their people proudIt took Haiti more than half a century to return to the World Cup, and the Caribbean underdogs have somewhat of a cruel challenge at hand, being grouped alongside world-class Brazil, African giants Morocco, and Scotland.While their 1-0 defeat to Scotland in the opening game did not dampen their spirit, Haiti know they face a far more difficult task against Brazil, who have no shortage of talent in their squad.The odds are stacked against Haiti, but in a tournament where upsets have not been uncommon, their fans are daring to dream.“Tomorrow [Friday], we’ve got everything to gain in a match like this. It’s been 52 years since we last featured in a World Cup, and now we’re up against Brazil – we’ve got to live up to ⁠our fans’ expectations,” coach Sebastien Migne said.“It’s a privilege to be here, ⁠and I hope we can make the Haitian people proud of us.“It would ‌be absolute madness in Haiti if we won this match,” he added.World No 85 Haiti, still looking for their first goal of this World Cup campaign, enter the match 80 spots below Brazil on the FIFA rankings.Haiti coach Sebastien Migne gives instructions to his players during a hydration break [Brian Snyder/Reuters]Brazil vs Haiti predictionStats provider Opta’s supercomputer has handed Brazil a whopping 87.3 percent probability of winning against Haiti, who have a mere 4.3 percent chance of winning. There is an 8.4 percent probability of a draw.Overall, Brazil are seventh in the list of title favourites – with a 5.2 percent probability – behind a bunch of teams including France, Argentina and England, who make up the top three.Brazil vs Haiti: Kickoff time, how to watch Brazil: GETV, SBT, Globoplay, Caze TV, TV Globo, sportv, NSPORTS (7:30pm Brasilia time) Haiti: TNH, Tele Haiti (8:30 pm Eastern Daylight Time) United Kingdom: STV, STV Player ITV1, ITVX (01:30 Saturday, British Summer Time) United States: FOX, FOX One, Telemundo App, Telemundo Network, Peacock (7:30pm Eastern Daylight Time) To check the TV listings for your country, head to FIFA’s TV listing schedule here.How does the group stage work?Brazil, Haiti, Morocco and Scotland are in Group C.Scotland lead the group with three points, followed by Morocco in second spot with one point. Brazil is in third place, also on a point, while Haiti is at the bottom with no points so far.The top two teams from each of the 12 groups – along with the eight best third-placed teams – proceed to the next phase, the round of 32, which has been introduced at the World Cup for the first time.(Al Jazeera)Form guide(Last five games, latest first)Brazil: D-W-W-W-LHaiti: L-L-W-D-LBrazil have performed significantly better than Haiti in their last five matches.They started their campaign in North America with a 1-1 draw with Morocco. Before the World Cup, Brazil registered victories over Egypt and Panama in friendlies and beat Croatia in March. But they lost to France in March.Haiti suffered a defeat to Scotland in their opening World Cup game. They lost to Peru and beat New Zealand in pre-World Cup friendlies earlier this month, while they drew with Iceland and lost to Tunisia in friendlies in March.Brazil vs Haiti: Head-to-headBrazil have faced Haiti three times, winning on all occasions. Their last meeting dates back to a 2016 Copa America group game, in which Brazil thrashed Haiti 7-1.Friday’s meeting between Brazil and Haiti will be their first at a World Cup.Brazil vs Haiti: Team newsJust as in their opening match, Brazil’s oft
contentParagraphs.zh: 2026年世界杯将有13个不同的开球时间。您可以使用半岛电视台体育小部件准确了解您的球队在当地时间的比赛时间。比赛对象：巴西 vs 海地 比赛内容：FIFA 2026 年世界杯 C 组比赛 地点：费城林肯金融球场 时间：当地时间周五下午 6:30（格林尼治标准时间周六 00:30） 如何关注：我们将从格林尼治标准时间 21:00 开始在直播文本评论流之前提供半岛电视台体育的所有进展。推荐故事列表 3 itemslist 1 of 3 路易斯·罗莫 (Luis Romo) 进球，墨西哥成为第一支进入世界杯淘汰赛的球队 list 2 of 36-0，科内受伤，2 张红牌：关于加拿大 vs 卡塔尔的一切都知道 matchlist 3 中的 3 波斯尼亚世界杯淘汰赛阶段的希望因 4-1 输给瑞士而破灭 名单结束 巴西在首场比赛中与摩洛哥战平，让球迷们怀疑多于相信，数以百万计的人想知道这位创纪录的五届冠军是否仍在名单之列巴西队在原本有望占据主导地位的小组中滑落至第三位，现在他们将在第二场小组赛中面对弱旅海地队，需要重新调整世界杯。如果主教练安切洛蒂想避免在小组赛中再次出现令人失望的表现，那么主教练安切洛蒂就需要解决他的球队的一些缺点。在巴西队与海地队开赛之前，需要了解的是：巴西队建议，目前还没有必要惊慌。虽然巴西队在第一场比赛中的疲软表现引发了人们对球队的质疑安切洛蒂认为目前还不必担心。对阵摩洛哥的比赛，巴西队在开局就表现出了紧张的迹象，难以应对非洲冠军的进攻。一些球员也难以应对激烈的比赛。这位刚刚执教一年多的意大利教练表示，即将到来的与海地的比赛为他的球队提供了一个解决弱点的机会。安切洛蒂周四在费城对记者说：“你不会在第一场比赛中就赢得世界杯。球员们的自我批评非常积极。我认为我们会解决问题；我仍然相信我们将具有竞争力。”在安切洛蒂手下缺乏个性，但这位绰号“唐·卡洛”的 67 岁老人认为，根据比赛情况调整战术更为重要。“我不想要单一的身份，”他说。 “我希望我的球队拥有多重身份。” 前皇马主帅卡洛·安切洛蒂于 2025 年 5 月接手球队 [Caean Couto/Imagn Images viaReuters] 海地希望让自己的人民感到自豪海地花了半个多世纪才重返世界杯，加勒比弱旅面临着残酷的挑战，与世界级的巴西、非洲豪门摩洛哥和苏格兰并列。首场比赛并没有挫伤他们的斗志，海地知道他们面对的任务要艰巨得多，对手巴西并不缺乏人才。对阵海地的胜算很大，但在一场冷门并不罕见的赛事中，他们的球迷敢于梦想。“明天（周五），我们将在这样的比赛中获得一切。距离我们上次参加世界杯已经有 52 年了，现在我们面对的是巴西——我们有不辜负我们球迷的期望，”教练塞巴斯蒂安·米涅说道。“能够来到这里是一种荣幸，我希望我们能让海地人民为我们感到骄傲。“如果我们赢了这场比赛，那对海地来说绝对是疯狂的，”他补充道。世界排名第 85 的海地队，仍在寻找他们本届世界杯的第一个进球，在国际足联排名上比巴西队低 80 位。海地教练塞巴斯蒂安·米涅指示[布莱恩·斯奈德/路透社]巴西对阵海地的预测 统计提供商 Opta 的超级计算机预测，巴西队战胜海地队的概率高达 87.3%，而海地队获胜的概率仅为 4.3%，平局的概率为 8.4%。 总体而言，巴西队在夺冠热门名单中排名第七（概率为 5.2%），落后于包括法国、阿根廷和英格兰在内的众多球队。巴西 vs 海地：开球时间、如何观看 巴西：GETV、SBT、Globoplay、Caze TV、TV Globo、sportv、NSPORTS（巴西利亚时间晚上 7:30） 海地：TNH、Tele Haiti（东部夏令时间晚上 8:30） 英国：STV、STV Player ITV1、ITVX（英国夏令时间周六 01:30） 美国：FOX、FOX One、Telemundo应用程序、Telemundo Network、Peacock（东部夏令时间晚上 7:30） 要查看您所在国家/地区的电视节目表，请前往此处查看 FIFA 的电视节目表。小组赛如何进行？巴西、海地、摩洛哥和苏格兰分在 C 组。苏格兰积 3 分位居小组第二，摩洛哥积 1 分位列第二，巴西排名第三，同样积 1 分，而海地目前无分垫底。 12 支球队中各排名前两名。小组 - 以及八个最好的第三名球队 - 进入下一阶段，即世界杯首次引入的 32 强。（半岛电视台）状态指南（最近五场比赛，最新的第一场）巴西：D-W-W-W-L 海地：L-L-W-D-LB 巴西在过去五场比赛中表现明显优于海地。他们在世界杯之前以 1-1 战平摩洛哥，开始了他们在北美的征程。巴西在三月份的友谊赛中战胜了埃及和巴拿马，但在三月份输给了法国。海地在世界杯首场比赛中输给了秘鲁，并在本月早些时候的世界杯友谊赛中击败了新西兰，而在三月份的友谊赛中，他们战平了冰岛，并输给了突尼斯。巴西对阵海地：巴西队与海地队交锋过三场，他们的上一次交锋可以追溯到2016年美洲杯。小组赛，巴西队以 7-1 击败海地队。周五巴西队与海地队的比赛将是他们在世界杯上的首次交锋。巴西队对阵海地队：球队新闻正如在首场比赛中一样，巴西队经常在世界杯上对阵海地队。

articles.title: Telegram questioned by Ofcom after arsonist who targeted Starmer-linked properties recruited on app
articles.summary:
Exclusive: Telegram urged to clarify how it detects illegal incitement after attacks were coordinated using app
Telegram is facing questions from Ofcom over how it detects and prevents illegal incitement after a Ukrainian man was found guilty of carrying out arson attacks on a ca
articles.titleZh: Telegram 因纵火者针对在应用程序上招募的与 Starmer 相关的房产而受到 Ofcom 质询
articles.summaryZh:
独家：Telegram 敦促澄清在使用应用程序协调攻击后如何检测非法煽动
在一名乌克兰男子被判纵火袭击一家咖啡馆后，Telegram 正面临 Ofcom 的质询，询问其如何检测和防止非法煽动行为。

contentParagraphs.en: Telegram is facing questions from Ofcom over how it detects and prevents illegal incitement after a Ukrainian man was found guilty of carrying out arson attacks on a car and property associated with Keir Starmer.A spokesperson for the regulator said it had contacted the messaging app “to seek further clarification” because the arsonist had been directed on Telegram by a handler linked to Russia.Roman Lavrynovych, 22, was convicted of conspiring with others to commit arson attacks in May 2025 at two properties linked to Starmer, and setting ablaze a Toyota the prime minister once owned in a street in north London.He and Stanislav Carpiuc, 27, a Ukrainian-born Romanian national who was found guilty of one count of arson, are due to be sentenced on Friday.Roman Lavrynovych, left, and Stanislav Carpiuc, will be sentenced on Friday. Photograph: Metropolitan Police/APThe trial heard that Lavrynovych and others had been offered payment to set fire to a car and two houses linked to Starmer via Telegram by a mysterious person named El Money, or “Hroshi” in Ukrainian, who communicated in Russian and Ukrainian.Reports in the Financial Times and BBC on Monday suggested Lavrynovych had been recruited several months earlier. The El Money account had links to a sabotage network based in Russia.The Online Safety Act places broad risk assessment and safety duties on social media companies to mitigate the risk of Britons encountering “illegal content”, giving them the responsibility to decide whether content on their networks breaks British laws.Police recovered more than 320 messages between El Money and Lavrynovych on Telegram dating back to September 2024. The anonymous handler, writing in Russian, offered Lavrynovych £3,000 in cryptocurrency if he set the fires, filmed them and got them on the news.After the arson attacks, El Money told Lavrynovych to leave the UK. “Look, you attacked the home of a very high-ranking person in Britain,” El Money wrote on Telegram. “I’ll send you money, you need to leave the city.”Roman Lavrynovych was found guilty of carrying out arson attacks on a car and property linked to Keir Starmer. Photograph: Counter Terrorism Policing/PATelegram is run by Russian-born Pavel Durov, a self-avowed libertarian who left the country in 2017 and relocated himself and the company to Dubai in the United Arab Emirates.The app had been widely used in Russia though is now in effect blocked there after a Kremlin crackdown in April.It remains widely used in Ukraine, though military and government officials have been banned from using it on their work phones for the past two years amid concerns it was enabling Russian spying and disinformation.Ofcom’s role is to make sure apps including Telegram have appropriate measures in place to comply with their legal duties, rather than telling social media networks which specific posts or accounts they should take down.An Ofcom spokesperson confirmed Telegram had been contacted in what was described informally as a pre-investigation. Telegram did not respond to a request for comment.In April, the regulator began an investigation into whether Telegram was doing enough to prevent the sharing of child sexual abuse material.At the time, Telegram said it had “virtually eliminated” child sexual material through “world-class detection algorithms and cooperation with NGOs” and that Ofcom’s accusation was false.
contentParagraphs.zh: 在一名乌克兰男子被判对 Keir Starmer 相关的汽车和财产进行纵火袭击后，Telegram 正面临 Ofcom 的质询，询问其如何检测和防止非法煽动行为。该监管机构发言人表示，已联系该消息应用“寻求进一步澄清”，因为纵火犯是由与俄罗斯有联系的处理者在 Telegram 上指示的。22 岁的 Roman Lavrynovych 因与他人合谋实施纵火袭击而被定罪。 2025 年 5 月，在与斯塔默有关的两处房产中，点燃了首相在伦敦北部一条街道上曾经拥有的一辆丰田车。他和 27 岁的斯坦尼斯拉夫·卡尔皮乌克 (Stanislav Carpiuc)，一名乌克兰出生的罗马尼亚人，被判犯有一项纵火罪，将于周五被判刑。罗曼·拉夫里诺维奇 (Roman Lavrynovych)（左）和斯坦尼斯拉夫·卡尔皮乌克 (Stanislav Carpiuc) 将于周五被判刑。图片来源：大都会警察局/美联社 审判获悉，拉夫里诺维奇和其他人被一个名叫 El Money（乌克兰语中的“Hroshi”）的神秘人通过 Telegram 提供的报酬放火焚烧一辆汽车和两栋房屋，该人通过 Telegram 与斯塔默联系在一起，该人用俄语和乌克兰语进行交流。英国《金融时报》和 BBC 周一的报道显示，拉夫里诺维奇几个月前就已被招募。 El Money 账户与俄罗斯的一个破坏网络存在链接。《在线安全法》对社交媒体公司规定了广泛的风险评估和安全责任，以减轻英国人遇到“非法内容”的风险，让他们有责任决定其网络上的内容是否违反英国法律。警方在 Telegram 上恢复了 El Money 和拉夫里诺维奇之间自 2024 年 9 月以来的 320 多条消息。匿名处理者用俄语写作，向拉夫里诺维奇提供了 3,000 英镑的报酬。如果他纵火、拍摄并上新闻，就会获得加密货币。 纵火袭击发生后，El Money 要求 Lavrynovych 离开英国。 El Money 在 Telegram 上写道：“看，你袭击了英国一位高级人士的家。” “我会给你寄钱，你需要离开这座城市。” 罗曼·拉夫里诺维奇 (Roman Lavrynovych) 因纵火袭击与凯尔·斯塔默 (Keir Starmer) 有关的汽车和财产而被判有罪。图片：Counter Terrorism Policing/PATelegram 由出生于俄罗斯的 Pavel Durov 负责运营，他自称是一位自由主义者，于 2017 年离开该国，并将自己和公司迁往阿拉伯联合酋长国的迪拜。该应用程序曾在俄罗斯广泛使用，但在 4 月份克里姆林宫镇压后实际上已被屏蔽。该应用程序在乌克兰仍然广泛使用，但过去两年来，由于担心军事和政府官员被禁止在工作电话上使用该应用程序，该应用程序已被禁止在工作手机上使用。俄罗斯间谍活动和虚假信息得以实现。Ofcom 的作用是确保包括 Telegram 在内的应用程序采取适当措施来履行其法律职责，而不是告诉社交媒体网络他们应该删除哪些具体帖子或帐户。Ofcom 发言人证实，我们已在非正式的预调查中联系了 Telegram。 Telegram 没有回应置评请求。 今年 4 月，监管机构开始调查 Telegram 是否采取了足够措施来防止儿童性虐待材料的共享。 当时，Telegram 表示，它已经通过“世界一流的检测算法以及与非政府组织的合作”“几乎消除了”儿童性虐待材料，并且 Ofcom 的指控是错误的。

articles.title: What you need to know about the preliminary U.S.-Iran agreement signed by Trump
articles.summary: Here's a look at the preliminary agreement between the U.S. and Iran, and the challenges that remain to find lasting peace.
articles.titleZh: 关于特朗普签署的美伊初步协议你需要了解什么
articles.summaryZh: 以下是美国和伊朗之间的初步协议，以及寻求持久和平仍然面临的挑战。

contentParagraphs.en: In this photo provided by the Islamic Republic News Agency (IRNA), Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian displays a memorandum of understanding signed with U.S. President Trump aimed at ending the war and launching negotiations on a broader agreement, in Tehran, Iran, early Thursday.
contentParagraphs.zh: 在伊斯兰共和国通讯社 (IRNA) 提供的这张照片中，伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽什基安 (Masoud Pezeshkian) 展示了周四早些时候在伊朗德黑兰与美国总统特朗普签署的一份谅解备忘录，旨在结束战争并就更广泛的协议启动谈判。

contentParagraphs.en: Iranian Presidency Office via AP
contentParagraphs.zh: 伊朗总统办公室（美联社）

contentParagraphs.en: Iranian Presidency Office via AP
contentParagraphs.zh: 伊朗总统办公室（美联社）

contentParagraphs.en: Vice President JD Vance has delayed his trip to Switzerland to negotiate the terms of a peace agreement with Iran on Friday.
contentParagraphs.zh: 副总统万斯推迟了周五前往瑞士就和平协议条款进行谈判的行程。

contentParagraphs.en: It's unclear exactly why the talks were called off at the last minute, with hundreds of journalists already waiting in the alpine city of Lucerne.
contentParagraphs.zh: 目前还不清楚谈判为何在最后一刻被取消，数百名记者已经在阿尔卑斯山城市卢塞恩等待。

contentParagraphs.en: But the delay raises questions over the sturdiness of the memorandum of understanding to end the war, signed by Trump on Wednesday.
contentParagraphs.zh: 但这一延迟引发了人们对特朗普周三签署的结束战争谅解备忘录的可靠性的质疑。

contentParagraphs.en: It came as Israel continued to heavily bombard Lebanon, despite the agreement promising to end all military operations, including in Lebanon.
contentParagraphs.zh: 尽管协议承诺结束包括在黎巴嫩的所有军事行动，但以色列仍在继续猛烈轰炸黎巴嫩。

contentParagraphs.en: Lebanese media said at least 18 were killed in overnight strikes, and Israel said four of its soldiers had been killed in fighting in southern Lebanon.
contentParagraphs.zh: 黎巴嫩媒体称，至少有 18 人在夜间袭击中丧生，以色列称其 4 名士兵在黎巴嫩南部的战斗中丧生。

contentParagraphs.en: Here are more details about the agreement and challenges they face in this latest effort to end the conflict:
contentParagraphs.zh: 以下是有关协议的更多详细信息以及他们在结束冲突的最新努力中面临的挑战：

contentParagraphs.en: US lifts naval blockade
contentParagraphs.zh: 美国解除海上封锁

contentParagraphs.en: There was immediate progress after the preliminary agreement to end the three-and-half month conflict that has killed thousands of people across the Middle East, rocked the global economy and pushed millions more into poverty around the world, according to the United Nations.
contentParagraphs.zh: 联合国称，在结束为期三个半月的冲突的初步协议后，立即取得了进展，这场冲突已造成中东地区数千人死亡，震撼了全球经济，并使世界各地数百万人陷入贫困。

contentParagraphs.en: The United States lifted its naval blockade on Iran.
contentParagraphs.zh: 美国解除了对伊朗的海上封锁。

contentParagraphs.en: The short memorandum of understanding also promises to end military operations on all fronts and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, the crucial waterway through which much of the world's oil, gas and fertilizer must pass to reach global markets.
contentParagraphs.zh: 这份简短的谅解备忘录还承诺结束各条战线的军事行动，并重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，这是世界上许多石油、天然气和化肥必须经过的重要水道才能到达全球市场。

contentParagraphs.en: The agreement prompted President Trump to celebrate on Truth Social writing: "Ships of the World, start your engines. Let the oil flow!"
contentParagraphs.zh: 该协议促使特朗普总统在真理社会上庆祝：“世界之船，启动你的引擎。让石油流动！”

contentParagraphs.en: But there are still many potential pitfalls. Even before the agreement was signed, Trump made its fragility clear: "It's a memorandum of understanding," he said at the G7 summit in France. "If I don't like it, if they don't behave, we'll go right back to dropping bombs right smack in the middle of their head."
contentParagraphs.zh: 但仍然存在许多潜在的陷阱。甚至在协议签署之前，特朗普就明确表示了其脆弱性：“这是一份谅解备忘录，”他在法国七国集团峰会上表示。 “如果我不喜欢这样，如果他们不守规矩，我们就会直接往他们的脑袋正中扔炸弹。”

contentParagraphs.en: The document doesn't solve the underlying reason for why the United States and Israel went to war with Iran. It creates a 60-day window — extendable by mutual agreement — for the two sides to resolve the enmity that goes back many decades.
contentParagraphs.zh: 该文件没有解决美国和以色列与伊朗开战的根本原因。它为双方解决数十年前的敌意创造了 60 天的窗口期（经双方同意可延长）。

contentParagraphs.en: Israel remains defiant against the deal
contentParagraphs.zh: 以色列仍然蔑视该协议

contentParagraphs.en: The preliminary agreement promises to end all military operations, including in Lebanon. Israel has invaded and taken large swaths of southern Lebanon in an offensive it says is targeting the Iranian-backed militia Hezbollah, which has killed more than 3,800 people, according to Lebanon's Health Ministry.
contentParagraphs.zh: 初步协议承诺结束所有军事行动，包括在黎巴嫩的军事行动。据黎巴嫩卫生部称，以色列入侵并占领了黎巴嫩南部大片地区，据称其攻击目标是伊朗支持的民兵真主党，该组织已造成 3,800 多人死亡。

contentParagraphs.en: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has made clear that Iran considers Israel's withdrawal from southern Lebanon essential. "Without the withdrawal of Israeli forces from the territories they occupied during this war, the war has not fully come to an end," Araghchi said.
contentParagraphs.zh: 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格奇明确表示，伊朗认为以色列从黎巴嫩南部撤军至关重要。阿拉格奇说：“如果以色列军队不从他们在这场战争中占领的领土上撤出，战争就还没有完全结束。”

contentParagraphs.en: Israel wasn't involved in the negotiations with Iran — though Trump said at a press conference this week that he had sent Israel a copy of the document before he signed it. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has remained defiant, saying his troops will remain in southern Lebanon for as long as Israel's security requires it.
contentParagraphs.zh: 以色列没有参与与伊朗的谈判——尽管特朗普在本周的新闻发布会上表示，他在签署该文件之前已向以色列发送了一份文件的副本。以色列总理本杰明·内塔尼亚胡仍然目中无人，表示只要以色列安全需要，他的军队就会留在黎巴嫩南部。

contentParagraphs.en: The conflict in Lebanon is causing an extraordinarily open rift between Trump and Netanyahu. "He's a very difficult guy," Trump said of the Israeli prime minister recently said to The New York Times.
contentParagraphs.zh: 黎巴嫩冲突正在导致特朗普和内塔尼亚胡之间异常公开的裂痕。 “他是一个非常难相处的人，”特朗普最近对《纽约时报》谈到以色列总理时说道。

contentParagraphs.en: On Thursday, Israel's military released a new map ⁠showing an expanded area of southern Lebanon occupied by its troops, which it describes as a buffer zone.
contentParagraphs.zh: 周四，以色列军方发布了一张新地图，显示了以色列军队占领的黎巴嫩南部扩大的地区，并将其描述为缓冲区。

contentParagraphs.en: "Trump's agreement does not bind us," Israel's far-right national security minister, Itamar Ben-Gvir, wrote on social media on Monday. "We are not partners to this agreement that does not ensure our security."
contentParagraphs.zh: “特朗普的协议对我们没有约束力，”以色列极右翼国家安全部长伊塔马尔·本-格维尔周一在社交媒体上写道。 “我们不是这项不能确保我们安全的协议的合作伙伴。”

contentParagraphs.en: Vice President Vance hit back at critics in the Israeli government, warning at a press conference that "Donald J. Trump is the only head of state in the entire world who is sympathetic to the nation of Israel at this moment in time."
contentParagraphs.zh: 副总统万斯回击了以色列政府的批评者，他在新闻发布会上警告说，“唐纳德·J·特朗普是全世界唯一一位此时此刻同情以色列国的国家元首。”

contentParagraphs.en: Trump signed the deal to avoid "economic catastrophe"
contentParagraphs.zh: 特朗普签署协议是为了避免“经济灾难”

contentParagraphs.en: The agreement promises "the immediate and permanent termination of military operations on all fronts" — including in Lebanon, where Israel has continued its offensive. Iran and the United States also promise "not to initiate" any further war or operation against each other. Not long after Trump signed the memorandum, U.S. Central Command said Thursday it had ended its naval blockade of ships to and from Iranian ports, as promised in the agreement.
contentParagraphs.zh: 该协议承诺“立即永久终止所有战线的军事行动”——包括以色列继续在黎巴嫩发动攻势。伊朗和美国还承诺“不再对彼此发动任何进一步的战争或行动”。特朗普签署备忘录后不久，美国中央司令部周四表示，已按照协议中的承诺结束了对进出伊朗港口的船只的海上封锁。

contentParagraphs.en: Iranian state media reported the country's national security council will suspend tolls paid by ships for 60 days, per the deal, but that ships must still request Iran's permission — through a newly established Persian Gulf Strait Authority, before passing through the Strait of Hormuz, which was once considered an international waterway.
contentParagraphs.zh: 伊朗官方媒体报道称，根据协议，该国国家安全委员会将暂停船舶支付通行费 60 天，但船舶在通过曾经被视为国际水道的霍尔木兹海峡之前，仍必须通过新成立的波斯湾海峡管理局请求伊朗的许可。

contentParagraphs.en: Increased ship traffic through the strait will come as a relief to Trump, whose approval ratings have been sliding as Americans see soaring gasoline prices and spiking inflation. Last month Trump insisted he doesn't think about Americans' financial situation in his approach to Iran.
contentParagraphs.zh: 通过海峡的船舶交通量的增加将使特朗普松一口气，随着美国人看到汽油价格飙升和通货膨胀加剧，特朗普的支持率一直在下滑。上个月，特朗普坚称他在对待伊朗问题时没有考虑美国人的财务状况。

contentParagraphs.en: But this week he acknowledged at a news conference that he had signed this agreement because he "didn't want to see an economic catastrophe."
contentParagraphs.zh: 但本周他在新闻发布会上承认，他签署这项协议是因为他“不想看到经济灾难”。

contentParagraphs.en: The memorandum gives major concessions to Iran
contentParagraphs.zh: 备忘录对伊朗作出重大让步

contentParagraphs.en: Trump has repeatedly called the Iran nuclear deal — formally known as the Joint Comprehensive Plan of Action (JCPOA) — presided over by President Barack Obama in 2015 the "worst deal ever," and Trump abandoned the agreement in his first term in office. But the framework agreement signed this week hands major financial concessions to Iran that could ultimately go much further than the Obama-era arrangement.
contentParagraphs.zh: 特朗普多次称由巴拉克·奥巴马总统于 2015 年主持的伊朗核协议——正式名称为《联合全面行动计划》(JCPOA) 是“有史以来最糟糕的协议”，特朗普在其第一个任期内就放弃了该协议。但本周签署的框架协议向伊朗做出了重大的财政让步，最终可能比奥巴马时代的安排走得更远。
